summary: iter235 testing complete. 14/14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Splash screen with gold particle swirl and Echo AURION logo, header rebrand to 'ECHO AURION' with department label, 4-pill department selector with localStorage persistence, new Dashboard tab with outlet pills and KPI tiles, 7-tile quick launch (Dashboard removed - now in tab bar), StaffConciergeView with 6 options, TicketsView with form, ShiftNotesView with voice-first dictation, GroupChatView (empty state OK), Voice panel with CognitiveMindCanvas and no auto-listen.

issues: KPI testids have double dashes (dash-kpi-food-- instead of dash-kpi-food) due to % in label being replaced with -. Minor cosmetic issue, KPIs render correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: KpiCard testid generation uses label.toLowerCase().replace(/\s|%/g, '-') which creates double dashes for 'Food %' → 'food--'. Consider using replace(/[\s%]+/g, '-') to avoid consecutive dashes.
test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed shift notes for testing persistence and sorting
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter235 features tested: (1) POST/GET /api/ecw-ops/shift-notes - creates and lists shift notes sorted desc by created_at. (2) GET /api/team-chat/rooms - returns empty list (OK per spec). (3) Splash screen shows gold particle swirl with Echo AURION logo PNG using mix-blend-mode screen. (4) Header shows 'ECHO AURION' (gold) + department label (Culinary default). No 'LUCCCA · ECW' visible. (5) Department selector has 4 pills (Culinary, FOH, Mixology R&D, Pastry) with testids dept-btn-{id}. Clicking toggles active style and persists to localStorage.ecw_department. (6) Bottom tab bar has 7 tabs including new 'Dash' (ecw-tab-dashboard). Dashboard tab shows outlet pills, KPI tiles (Revenue/Food/Labor/Prime), occupancy strip, recent activity. (7) Quick launch has 7 tiles (Concierge, Tickets, Shift, Chat, Activity, P&L, Weather). Dashboard tile REMOVED (now in tab bar). (8) StaffConciergeView has 6 concierge option buttons. (9) TicketsView has title, detail, priority buttons, submit. (10) ShiftNotesView has am/pm/overnight toggles, text area, mic button, save button. (11) GroupChatView renders empty state. (12) Voice panel has CognitiveMindCanvas, proactive briefing greeting with rain warning, NO auto-listen (user must tap 'Hold to speak'). (13) Recipes tab and weather strip still work (regression).
